hero.name: Ismail Samurkas
hero.role: Computer Engineering Student | Autonomous Systems & ROS 2 Developer | Teknofest UGV 5th Place
hero.description: I am a Computer Engineering student at Karabuk University, focusing on autonomous systems, robotics (ROS 2), and AI (YOLO). I develop navigation and communication systems for the EVRENOS UGV team, which ranked 5th in Turkey at Teknofest.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who I am and what I do
about.bio: I am a Computer Engineering student at Karabuk University, focusing on autonomous systems, robotics (ROS 2), and AI (YOLO). I develop navigation and communication systems for the EVRENOS UGV team, which ranked 5th in Turkey at Teknofest. I also build desktop automations and network programming projects using PyQt and C#. Outside of coding, I enjoy riding cross motorcycles, skiing, and outdoor sports.
